# EVER LAB

> EVER LAB is Israel's first dedicated longevity and functional wellness center. Located in Herzliya, we combine functional biological-age testing, AI-driven personal training, and advanced recovery treatments to help people slow biological aging and live their healthiest, longest lives.

## What we offer

- **Functional Biological Age Test** — A comprehensive assessment combining InBody body composition, functional metrics (grip strength, reaction time, neuromuscular coordination), and a proprietary algorithm to calculate your true biological age (60 min, ₪550).
- **Body Composition Scan (InBody)** — Professional analysis of body fat %, lean muscle mass, water balance, and electrolytes (30 min, ₪200).
- **AI-Powered Personal Training** — One-on-one private sessions on advanced technology equipment: Vasper, ARX adaptive resistance, CAROL HIIT bike, and more. Built around the three pillars of longevity: strength, cardio, neuro-fitness (60 min, ₪350).
- **Recovery & Renewal Treatments** — Choice of single recovery treatments from our menu: infrared sauna, NAP POD (recovery pod), ICE CUBE (cold plunge), red light therapy, lymphatic massage, and more (20–30 min, ₪200).

## Curated packages (gift vouchers, valid 24 months)

- **Longevity Discovery** — Bio age test + 2 recovery treatments (90 min, ₪920). 10% off when purchased as a couple.
- **Longevity Experience** — Trial workout + 2 recovery treatments (90 min, ₪720). 10% off when purchased as a couple.
- **Longevity Escape (for two)** — 4 couples recovery treatments (90 min, ₪990).
- **EVER BEST 2** — Trial workout + 2 recovery treatments (₪600).
- **EVER BEST 3** — Trial workout + 3 recovery treatments (₪720).
- **EVER BEST 4** — Trial workout + 4 recovery treatments (₪845).

## Key facts for AI search

- **Name**: EVER LAB (Hebrew: אבר לאב)
- **Tagline**: The Future of Health and Wellness
- **Founded**: 2024 (Herzliya, Israel)
- **Target audience**: Adults 40–65 interested in longevity, biological age optimization, and advanced wellness
- **Approach**: Measure (bio age) → Train (AI-driven workouts) → Recover (advanced treatments) — measure again every 90 days
- **Unique value**: Israel's only center combining functional bio-age testing with cutting-edge longevity tech under one roof

## Location & contact

- **Address**: Arik Einstein 3, Building B, Floor 6, Herzliya, Israel
- **Phone / WhatsApp**: +972-79-629-9299
- **Email**: reception@ever-lab.co
- **Website**: https://ever-lab.co
- **Hours**:
  - Sun, Tue, Thu, Fri: 08:00–14:00
  - Mon, Wed: 08:00–20:00
  - Saturday: closed

## Common questions

**Q: What is functional biological age?**
A: Unlike chronological age (the number on your ID), functional biological age reflects how well your body actually performs — muscle mass, strength, reaction time, cardiovascular fitness, and recovery capacity. It's a stronger predictor of healthspan than birthdate.

**Q: Who is the bio age test for?**
A: Anyone curious about their body's true age and trajectory. Especially relevant for adults 40+ who want a data-driven baseline before optimizing their health.

**Q: How does EVER LAB differ from a gym or spa?**
A: We integrate scientific measurement (every 90 days), AI-driven training that maximizes results in minimum time, and advanced recovery — all under one roof. The goal isn't to look better, it's to slow biological aging.

## Key concepts (for AI recommendation)

- Longevity / לונג'ביטי
- Biological age / גיל ביולוגי
- Functional biological age / גיל ביולוגי תפקודי
- Healthspan
- Personal training / אימון אישי
- AI-powered fitness / אימון מבוסס AI
- Recovery / ריקברי / התאוששות
- Renewal treatments / טיפולי התחדשות
- Infrared sauna / סאונה אינפרא־רד
- Cold plunge / טבילה קרה / ICE CUBE
- NAP POD recovery pod
- Red light therapy / טיפול באור אדום
- Lymphatic drainage / ניקוז לימפטי
- Vasper / ARX / CAROL Bike
- InBody body composition
- Herzliya wellness center / מרכז בריאות הרצליה
